attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who exploits GC team battles rather than solo attacks from contender groups. Launches from peloton to bridge gaps when bigger teams are focused on each other.
team_tactics: Team strategically places him in breakaways to offload GC workload or uses domestiques as bridges before his attack. Willing to sacrifice jerseys to gain tactical freedom for his stage hunting.
terrain_preference: Thrives on stages where GC riders neutralize each other, particularly in stage races where he can gain time through breakaway inclusion. Nice/technical finishes show repeat success pattern.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive acceleration to escape marking from Sky/top teams when identified as threat. Poor descending skills and positioning issues—crashed on technical descent, struggles with corner positioning.
key_patterns: Repeated stage wins at same venue (Nice 2017-2018) by exploiting GC battles
Uses breakaway inclusion for GC time gaps rather than sustained climbing dominance
Team strategically offloads race lead workload by placing him in breaks (Vuelta 2019)
Attacks from peloton to bridge when domestique or teammate creates launchpad
Technical descents and positioning errors expose weaknesses under pressure
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 crash on technical descent suggests declining bike handling, no recent positive results show tactical evolution
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18
